title: anemone multifida var. lanigera
intro: Anemone multifida var. lanigera, also known as Chinese anemone, is a plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Anemone multifida var. lanigera are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form, or applied topically as a poultice, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
